haiku:
Galaxies abound,
Lightsabers dance in starlight,
Joy ignites the night.
Happy #StarWarsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Zesty peels delight,
Sugared sunlight dances bright,
Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalCandiedOrangePeelDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Silken gowns twirl bright,
Champagne bubbles dance with cheer,
Timeless grace ignites.
#HappyBirthdayAudreyHepburn from @ClamBakeSanta
